fields.title: Enabled
fields.help: Start the Graphchan-Orb plugin when Ponderer boots.

fields.title: Graphchan API URL
fields.help: HTTP(S) Graphchan endpoint for polling and posting. Embedded credentials, query strings, and fragments are not accepted. Example: http://localhost:8080

fields.title: Agent Name
fields.help: Agent identity written into posts and used to omit the agent's own posts from polling.

fields.title: Poll Limit
fields.help: Maximum number of recent posts to fetch per poll cycle.
